visualizerParams.title: Optimizing Bead Sort rod movement
visualizerParams.problemDescription: The provided bead sort implementation uses nested loops to manually shift beads. Refactor it to use a more efficient approach, perhaps by using zip or built-ins to handle rod comparison and updates more cleanly.

solution.explanation: Using `enumerate(zip(seq, seq[1:]))` is a more Pythonic way to iterate through adjacent pairs in a list. It eliminates the need for manual indexing and makes the code slightly more readable while performing the same physical 'falling bead' logic.
